# AryanForge — AI Automation Studio
> Premium AI automation, web platforms, and conversational AI for forward-thinking enterprises.

## About
AryanForge is a premium AI automation studio founded by Aryan. We build custom AI agents, high-performance websites, intelligent chatbots, and SEO automation engines for businesses worldwide.

- **Founder**: Aryan
- **Email**: aryan@launchwitharyan.ai
- **WhatsApp**: +918877390736
- **Website**: https://aryanforge.com

## Key Services
- [AI Workflow Automation](https://aryanforge.com/services/ai-automation) — Custom AI agents for lead gen, support, data entry, and reporting. ROI in 60-90 days.
- [Premium Web Platforms](https://aryanforge.com/services/web-platforms) — Astro/React sites with sub-100ms load times, SEO-optimized and WCAG AA accessible.
- [AI Chatbot Development](https://aryanforge.com/services/ai-bots) — Intelligent chatbots with RAG, memory, and human handoff. Deploy on web, WhatsApp, Slack.
- [SEO Automation Engine](https://aryanforge.com/services/seo-automation) — AI content strategy, auto-blog generation, SERP analysis.

## Pricing
- **Starter** — $2,499 setup (1 workflow/site), 2-week delivery
- **Growth** — $4,999 setup (3 workflows/site), 3-week delivery
- **Enterprise** — $9,999+ custom, 4-6 week delivery
- Chatbots starting at $2,499 | Maintenance plans from $149/mo

## Tech Stack
Python FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Astro, React, Tailwind, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, Groq Llama 3.3, LangChain, Ollama, JWT, Razorpay

## Portfolio Highlights
- Synthetix LLM Sentiment Engine — 94% accuracy in sentiment trends
- Linear-UX Corporate Architecture — 100/100 Core Web Vitals
- Supabase Realtime CRM — 450+ hours saved per month
